problem: ENGINE OVERSPEED.
action: REVIEWED G1000 FLIGHT DATA LOG & DETERMINED ENGINE DID NOT EXCEED 2700 RPM. CONTACTED PILOT & CONFIRMED NO ANNUNCIATORS, BELLS ALERTED & ENGINE RPM AT NO POINT INDICATED IN RED. DETERMINED NO OVERSPEED OCCURED.

problem: RPM'S REACHED 2740 FOR ABOUT 1 SECOND.

problem: UPON TAKE OFF, BOTH PRIMARY & STANDBY AIRSPEED PRODUCED NO AIRSPEED.

action: DETERMINED TO BE PILOT INDUCED MOMENTARY OVERSPEED, NO FURTHER ACTIONS REQUIRED.

action: NO FURTHER ACTION REQUIRED.
